results.title: Soccer-Mexico World Cup legacy must include women beyond the stadiums, Afghan activist Popal says
results.description: MEXICO CITY, July ⁠3 (Reuters) - As the World Cup brings cameras, money, and global celebration to Mexico, former Afghanistan women's national team captain Khalida ⁠Popal is asking a critical question: how much of that spotlight will reach the vulnerable girls and refugees outside the ‌stadium gates?

results.title: Loggers Legion baseball falls to AA Lakers, 7-1
results.description: Jul. 3—Hunter Fann hit a two-run homer and the Kalispell AA Lakers picked up a 7-1 road victory over the Libby Loggers Tuesday in Legion baseball at Lee Gehrig Field. Miles Arrowsmith added a pair of doubles for the Lakers (8-9), who jumped ahead 3-0 in the fourth inning. Tait Orme was hit by a pitch to reach, setting up Fann. He jumped on a 2-2 pitch to left and made it a 2-0 game. Lincoln ...

results.title: The Legend Of Fireball now available on Switch
Switzerland Celebrates Historic FIFA World Cup Victory Over Algeria
results.description: Switzerland has made history by defeating Algeria 2-0 in the Round of 32 of the FIFA World Cup 2026, marking their first knockout stage win since 1954. With goals from Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye, the team is eager to build on this success as they prepare for their next match. Ndoye expressed the significance of this victory for both the team and the nation, emphasizing their desire for further achievements. The Swiss side will now focus on their upcoming challenge against either Colombia or Ghana.

results.title: BBC Wimbledon presenter Clare Balding says Sinner should give up prize money live on air
results.description: Grigor Dimitrov made a triumphant return to Wimbledon on Thursday evening, and Clare Balding was left in no doubt as to who deserved a share of Jannik Sinner's £3m prize money from last year's title win

results.title: Opinion: America celebrates liberty. But can it still practice mercy?
results.description: American freedom endures only if we remain the kind of people who can hold one another accountable and offer one another a way back.

results.title: England Reveals Squad for Second T20I Against India at Old Trafford
results.description: As the second T20I between England and India approaches, England has announced their playing eleven, featuring debutant Josh Tongue and the return of Jofra Archer. The first match ended in no result due to rain, but both teams are eager to take the lead in the series. Key performances from players like Abhishek Sharma and Shreyas Iyer highlighted India's batting strength, while the English side looks to bounce back. Read on for more details about the match and player insights.
